episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1101_100:
Dawn, Lucas, and Barry were enjoying the
festivities at the beach.
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_300: But I still feel like I need more!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_400: You sure are full of energy, Barry.
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_500:
Come to think of it, I remember hearing the
festival would have a Pokémon battling
event.
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_600: But that hasn’t happened yet today, has it?
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_700:
Oh! That’s true! I was looking forward 
to that.
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_800:
But the sun’s already setting. Isn’t the festival
about to, y’know, end?
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_100: You did well to stay this late!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_120:
Wait... These are the lifeguards from the
beach today!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_140:
But in truth, we’re also your opponents for
today’s secret festival event—
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_160:
If you can take us down one by one in
Pokémon battles, we’ll recognize you as
exactly that—brave heroes of the sea!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_170:
And that’s not all—we’ll tell you a little
secret, too!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_180:
I don’t really get what’s going on, but we’ve
just gotta beat you guys, right?
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_220:
But our Pokémon work as lifeguards day and
night. They’re strong too, you know!
episode_event_8060honorget/4001_1001_240:
I feel like I’ve seen that same combination of
Pokémon somewhere recently...
episode_event_8060honorget/4002_1001_100: Aw, man! You got us good!
episode_event_8060honorget/4002_1001_200:
I’m impressed. Henceforth, we recognize you
as brave heroes of the sea!
episode_event_8060honorget/4002_1001_300:
You said you’d tell us a “little secret” if
we won. What is it?
episode_event_8060honorget/4002_1001_500:
If you follow this beach alllll the way to its
east end, you’ll find a stone arch. Try going
under it!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_100:
Well, we’re under the stone arch, just like
she said.
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_400:
You did wonderfully solving this ocean
mystery!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_600:
Now that your bravery has been
acknowledged, I have gifts for you from the
prince of the sea!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_700: WHOA! What a beautiful blue stone!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_800: And this potato mochi looks so tasty!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_900:
Manaphy found the stones, and the potato
mochi is from me!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_100:
The prince of the sea... That’s it! I knew the
lineup of Pokémon we battled was familiar.
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_110:
They were all part of a Sinnoh legend about
Manaphy. That must’ve been the event’s
theme!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_130:
I had no idea, so I was surprised when they
suddenly asked me to help.
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_140: But it made for a good memory in the end!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_160:
It seems Manaphy and I had a good reason
to wait here after all!
episode_event_8060honorget/4003_1001_170: I’m glad you all enjoyed it!
